note: Event frames extracted from the uploaded Cast #1 footage. RSP located by visual inspection (rod first straight, loop nose forming); the other events use the article's exact inter-event timing (Table 1) converted to frames at 500 fps. Frames are grayscale, downscaled and labelled.
